description: A radiologist needs to compare bone and soft-tissue structures for a pre-treatment review using the CT Cranium DICOM scan loaded in InVesalius 3. Create two separate segmentation masks: one for bone (226–3071 HU) and one for soft tissue (-700 to 225 HU). Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/tissue_comparison.inv3. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
